summary: Tested 3 NEW features: Animal Totems, Dreams, Green Journal. All 21 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend fully functional with all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test dreams and green journal entries created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Animal Totems, Dreams, and Green Journal features are complete and working. Dream interpretation uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key. Moon phase is calculated astronomically (currently 'First Quarter').

GET /api/animal-totems/all.totem_structure: id, name, dates, element, direction, clan, color, stone, plant, power, shadow, medicine, when_appears

frontend_page.12_birth_totems_list: Displayed with dates, elements, power descriptions
frontend_page.totem_detail_view: Shows power, shadow, medicine, dream meaning sections

GET /api/dream-symbols.sample_symbols: water, flying, falling, teeth, death, snake, house, forest, fire, moon

POST /api/dreams.fields: title, content, mood, vividness, lucid, symbols, interpretation

GET /api/dreams.returns: User's dreams sorted by created_at desc

frontend_page.dream_form: Title, content, mood dropdown, vividness slider, lucid checkbox
frontend_page.dream_list: Shows saved dreams with mood and moon phase tags

POST /api/green-journal.fields: entry_type, title, content, plants, animals_seen, weather, season, gratitude

GET /api/green-journal.returns: User's entries sorted by created_at desc

frontend_page.entry_form: Type, weather, season dropdowns; title, content, plants, animals, gratitude fields
frontend_page.nature_prompts: Random prompts displayed (e.g., 'What animal crossed your path?')
frontend_page.moon_phase_display: Shows current moon phase with meaning
frontend_page.entry_list: Shows saved entries with plant/animal tags
frontend_page.entry_types: observation, plant spirit, animal encounter, weather, gratitude, seasonal reflection
